perms.title: Network permissions required
perms.body: MidoriVPN needs to configure the system to work correctly.
perms.modalSubtitle:
MidoriVPN will make the following system changes.
All changes are automatically reverted when the app is closed.

caps.title: Agent capabilities cap_net_admin, cap_net_raw, cap_dac_override, cap_linux_immutable
caps.desc: Allow creating WireGuard interfaces, managing routes, writing /etc/resolv.conf, and protecting it from overwrite.

firewall.title: Firewall rules (firewalld / ufw / nftables)
firewall.desc: Scoped rules by source and destination for local RPC, the WireGuard tunnel, and active Mesh peers. Only required rules are applied.

killswitch.title: Kill switch — nftables table inet midorivpn_guard
killswitch.desc: Blocks all outbound traffic except the VPN tunnel while connected. Ensures no leaks if the VPN drops.
killswitch.revert: Removed when VPN disconnects or app closes.

dns.title: DNS protection — /etc/resolv.conf
dns.desc: While the VPN is active, the agent protects DNS to prevent leaks. Backs up the original resolv.conf.

aa.title: AppArmor / SELinux (informational) — system profiles
aa.desc: If AppArmor or SELinux are active, MidoriVPN profiles are installed by the system package (postinst). Not modified at runtime.

auth.signInHint: Sign in with your Astian account to connect to MidoriVPN.
auth.completeInBrowser: Complete sign-in in the browser and return here.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

login.subtitle: Sign in with your Astian account to join your private network.
login.hint: The browser will open. Once approved, return to MidoriVPN and the session will complete automatically.

mesh.locked: 🔒 Mesh disabled until network permissions are granted on the VPN tab.
mesh.noPeers: No peers connected. To route traffic through a peer, select it as a server in the VPN tab.

settings.meshAutoStartHint: Recommended. Turns this device into a mesh peer once you sign in.
settings.autoStartHint: Runs in tray when you log in (XDG autostart)
settings.tokenStoreFallback: Using encrypted file fallback. Unlock your system keyring for stronger credential protection.
settings.revertPermsHint: Removes agent capabilities (setcap -r). VPN and Mesh will be disabled until granted again.

quit.label: Quit MidoriVPN
quit.confirmBody: The VPN will disconnect and the agent will stop. You can reopen the app from the application menu.
